JP

HomeMint

Hikeshi NFT Project

"The Japanese Sophistication" "The Spirit of Japan"

Spring, summer, autumn, and winter are the four seasons that change the expression every season. Patterns and patterns unique to Japan have been passed on from ancient times. The wisdom of people who have wished to express natural phenomena and events that exist in the world as something tangible.

We want to deliver to the world that such Japanese expression is "粋(Iki: Japanese sophistication)" and valuing "和(Wa: Harmony)" is the spirit of Japan.

Delivering "The Japanese Sophistication" and "The Spirit of Japan" to all the people we meet through this brand, HiKESHi SPiRiT. Learn from the past, capture the present, and connect it to the future; these are our mission.

Yuko Osada
